name: Kiwi
description: Kiwi is a fruit of ovoid shape, of variable size and covered with a brown fuzzy thin skin.

name: Strawberry
description: The strawberry is a succulent and fragrant fruit of bright red colour, obtained from the plant with the same name.

name: Avocado
description: The avocado is a fleshy exotic fruit, the skin is thick and tough, of a green colour and the tone depends on the variety.

name: Peach
description: The peach is a round, coloured, juicy fruit, typically eaten in summer. Many countries produce peaches.

name: Pomegranate
description: Pomegranates are round, reddish-brown fruits with a hard, smooth exterior.

name: Mango
description: It has an ovoid shape, non-edible rind and variable colour, from of pale yellow to dark red.

name: Pineapple
description: Mature pineapples have a very singular fragrance, a beautiful colour and pleasant bittersweet taste.

name: Coconut
description: Coconut is a round and elongate fruit of white, fibrous and oily meat covered by a thick, brown and hairy shell.

name: Banana
description: Is a lengthy yellow fruit, and its flavour is more or less sweet, depending on the variety.

name: Watermelon
description: The watermelon is a large fruit of a more or less spherical shape. It is usually eaten raw as table dessert.
